# Leadpages — llms.txt
# https://www.leadpages.com/llms.txt

> Leadpages is a lead generation platform that helps small businesses
> build websites, landing pages, pop-ups, and alert bars to collect
> leads and close sales.

## Docs

- [Leadpages Homepage](https://www.leadpages.com/)
- [Pricing](https://www.leadpages.com/pricing)
- [Features](https://www.leadpages.com/product/features)
- [Templates](https://www.leadpages.com/templates)
- [Landing Page Builder](https://www.leadpages.com/product/landing-page-builder)
- [Website Builder](https://www.leadpages.com/product/website-builder)
- [Pop-Ups](https://www.leadpages.com/product/pop-ups)
- [Alert Bars](https://www.leadpages.com/product/alert-bars)
- [AI Engine](https://www.leadpages.com/product/ai-engine)
- [Integrations](https://www.leadpages.com/integrations)
- [Blog](https://www.leadpages.com/blog)
- [Help Center](https://support.leadpages.com/)
